---
title: "Google Analytics"
description: "Google Analytics learning, practice, and portfolio examples."
---

## Google Analytics

This section is reserved for Arturo's **Google Analytics** work, including practice exercises, certifications, screenshots, reports, and reflections.

Google Analytics is a useful bridge between Arturo's sales/customer-service background and his marketing education. It can show how customer behavior, website activity, and campaign performance connect to business decisions.

## Portfolio Slots

::: {.content-grid}
::: {.content-card}
### GA4 Learning Notes

Add notes about GA4 concepts such as events, conversions, traffic acquisition, engagement, users, sessions, and reporting.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Sample Reports

Add screenshots or summaries of reports showing how to interpret customer behavior, traffic sources, or campaign performance.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Business Insights

Add short writeups that answer questions such as:

- **What happened?**
- **Why might it have happened?**
- **What should a business do next?**
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Certification

Add any Google Analytics or digital marketing certificates here once complete.
:::
:::
